risks.description: Resolves the core problem for Primary User: Value proposition lacks quantitative evidence. No baseline metrics cited to support the claimed improvement.
Requirement REQ-01: Core solution addressing: Users cannot discover relevant con: Critical requirement acceptance criteria may not be independently verifiable without production data.
Persona 'Primary User' is well-grounded: Persona relies on single data source (problem_statement_analysis). Single-source personas risk being artifacts of methodology, not real user segments.
